title: Ness of Thorny Knolls
summary: A spring update for Ness of Thorny Knolls, the red bull calf with the pale nose, as he grows into his own beside Pumpkin and his sister.

images.alt: Ness of Thorny Knolls standing beside his sister in the pasture
images.caption: Ness, the red calf with the pale nose, standing shoulder to shoulder with his sister.

images.alt: Ness and his sister together in the spring pasture
images.caption: A good side-by-side look at the calves; Ness is the red one with the pale nose.

images.alt: Pumpkin watching over Ness and his sister
images.caption: Pumpkin keeps watch while Ness and his sister sort out the pasture routine.

images.alt: Ness walking near the rocks at Thorny Knolls
images.caption: Ness moving through the rocky edge of the pasture with his usual steady confidence.

images.alt: Ness standing in the woods at Thorny Knolls
images.caption: A red coat, a pale nose, and a calf already learning every corner of the place.

images.alt: Ness and his sister near the rocks and trees
images.caption: Ness and his sister working through the brush line together.

images.alt: Ness facing the camera with his pale nose visible
images.caption: The pale nose makes Ness easy to pick out once you know what to look for.
Ness at the fence line, growing into the shape and presence of a young Highland bull.
Ness almost disappearing into the spring growth, except for that red coat and pale nose.

images.alt: Ness standing in tall green pasture
images.caption: The May pasture gives Ness plenty to investigate.

images.alt: Ness framed by tree limbs near the rocks
images.caption: A quiet moment with Ness framed by the trees and rock line.

images.alt: Calf in the spring pasture for review
images.caption: Review before publishing: this lighter calf may be Ness's sister rather than Ness.

images.alt: Calf browsing near a tree for review
images.caption: Review before publishing: this photo may show Ness's sister.

images.alt: Calf standing in green spring growth for review
images.caption: Review before publishing: confirm whether this is Ness or his sister.
